hooks.command: printf '\n[AUTO-SKILL CHECK] Scan this conversation for any non-obvious technical problem you solved — a workaround, constraint, AWS/K8s/Terraform quirk, or behavioural rule. Ask: is it already in /Users/mac/Desktop/chautv-proops2026/memory/skills-ledger.md? Would knowing it earlier have saved 10+ minutes? If both answers are yes/no respectively: call /save-skill immediately, without waiting for the user to ask. If nothing qualifies, stay silent.'

bash -c 'output=$(cat); if echo "$output" | grep -qiE "(AccessDenied|error|failed|exception|cannot|denied|not authorized|no such|timed out)" && echo "$output" | grep -qiE "(fixed|resolved|workaround|instead|use|correct)"; then printf "\n[SKILL-SIGNAL] This Bash output shows an error that was diagnosed and fixed. Strong candidate for /save-skill — check if the solution pattern is already in skills-ledger.md."; fi'
